name: Sunrise Golf
about: Sunrise Golf is a year-round golf destination offering both a 9-hole outdoor course and an indoor golf simulator facility. Established in 1983, the venue provides a casual environment with a bar and patio for post-round refreshments. The indoor golf simulator operates during the winter months and can be booked by the hour, while the outdoor course is walk-on friendly with tee times available for the simulator. The venue also features an 18-hole disc golf course and hosts tournaments and events.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round indoor golf access with state-of-the-art simulator technology
Flexible walk-on play with available tee times
On-site bar and patio for socializing after a round
Versatile venue for tournaments, parties, and special events

food_and_drink.notes: Limited food options available; can bring your own food or use recommended caterers for events
Full bar available on-site for post-round refreshments

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art golf simulator with multiple course options and play formats

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you need to bring your own golf clubs to use the golf simulator.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Limited food options are available on-site, and you can bring your own food for events. A full bar is available for beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes on the simulator varies depending on your pace and group size, but typically ranges from 1-2 hours.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Sunrise Golf offers junior rates and is suitable for families, making it a kid-friendly venue.
